title: Lively Smoky Algerian Chickpeas Tagine
description: A winey, smoky chickpea dish with crunchy grilled tofu, perfect for a vegan Algerian dinner.
instructions: Preheat the ceramic-tagine to medium heat, brush with olive oil.
Sauté onion and garlic until translucent, stirring frequently.
Add smoked paprika, cumin, oregano, coriander, and crushed juniper berries, cooking for one minute to bloom the spices.
Pour in the white wine and let it reduce by half, scraping the bottom of the vessel.
Stir in the chickpeas, vegetable broth, and diced smoked tofu, then cover the tagine.
Transfer the tagine to the oven and bake at 180°C for 25 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld.
While the tagine bakes, quickly grill the tofu pieces on a hot grill pan until crisp on the edges.
After baking, stir in the grilled tofu, ensuring it stays crunchy.
Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper, if needed.
Garnish with fresh parsley before serving.
